description_long: This is a women's open-toe sandal featuring olive green, textured criss-cross straps made of synthetic or woven material. The sandal has a slingback design with an adjustable buckle strap at the heel for a secure fit. The insole appears lightly cushioned and is a pale beige color, providing comfort for the foot. The midsole is wrapped in a woven, espadrille-style material, giving the shoe a casual, summery look. The outsole is made of a light brown rubber or synthetic material with a slight wedge for added height. The overall construction suggests a blend of comfort and style, suitable for urban walking and casual outings.
description: An olive green, open-toe sandal with criss-cross textured straps, a slingback buckle, and an espadrille-style wedge sole. The design is casual and comfortable, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the criss-cross straps, slingback heel, and espadrille-wrapped wedge sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open-toe design and the way the straps cross over the toes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the buckle strap and the textured material of the straps.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the heel strap and the back of the wedge sole.
